evidence_quote: “This I will not do.” “You will,” Dany said, “or when Drogo wakes, he will hear why you defied me.” Furious, Qotho wheeled his stallion around and galloped off in anger … but Dany knew he would return with Mirri Maz Duur, however little he might like it.
